svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="User Registration" id="Md07MzhQ_YLtNMia1D9n"> <mxGraphModel dx="1147" dy="620" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="200" pageHeight="413" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-145" parent="1" style="shape=rect;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;whiteSpace=wrap;align=center;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="Admin Role Management System" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="420" width="540" x="130" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-146" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;" value="Admin" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="30" x="20" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-147" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="View User List" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="170" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-148" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Select User" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="170" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-149" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Assign Role or
Deactivate Account" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="170" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-150" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Retrieve Users
&amp; Roles" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="450" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-151" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Update Cognito
User Group" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="450" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-152" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Display Empty State
(Alternate)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="450" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-153" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Reject Self-Role
Change (Alternate)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="450" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Hzwm2MyJDhyiyZ1_0MkF-154" edge="1" parent="1"
